title: Nika Returns on Egghead — Chapter 1110
main_description: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 102 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
The display-ready parts preserve the cleaned dialogue while keeping uncertain speakers clearly marked.
